quoteText: So they are no longer two, but one flesh. Therefore what God has joined together, let no one separate.
storyBody: In a garden of grace, two souls were brought together by divine purpose. What began as a moment of creation became a journey of companionship and love.
Walking side by side, we have discovered that every step taken together is a reflection of a greater promise. Now, we invite you to witness the start of our forever.
letterBody: We are honored to share this sacred day with you. As we enter into the covenant of marriage, we look back at the path that led us here with gratitude.
Your presence is a blessing to us as we begin our life together, rooted in faith and blooming in love.
letterClosing: With grace and love, Adam & Eve

scheduleItems.description: Witness the exchange of vows under the grace of God.
Gather for refreshments and joyful fellowship.
Celebrate the union with a banquet and songs of praise.

accommodations.name: The Sanctuary Hotel
accommodations.description: A peaceful place to rest during the wedding weekend.

giftSubheading: Your love and support mean the world to us. If you wish to honour us with a gift, a contribution to our future together would be greatly appreciated.
storyLeadQuote: 'This is now bone of my bones and flesh of my flesh; she shall be called Woman, for she was taken out of man.'
